title: High fire danger conditions expected inland on Monday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South African Weather Service (Saws) has released its latest weather forecast for Monday 24 March.


> The weather service warns of extremely high fire danger conditions over the Beaufort West municipality tomorrow.


Isolated showers & thundershowers are expected over the central & eastern parts of the country, but scattered over the south-eastern areas.

Here are the expected temperatures on Monday:

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
